prompt:
A finished, polished PLA trophy sitting on a clean microfiber cloth, with a soft sheen and smudge-free surfaces, as if just wiped down for photos. A pair of nitrile-gloved hands (no face visible) lightly adjusts the trophy’s angle, emphasizing dust-and-fingerprint removal and a ready-to-display finish.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk studio aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, subtle back glow, no logos, no readable text, and minimal clutter. Compose the trophy prominently and clearly so it reads well as an inventory icon.
